== Biography ==

Inspired by their friends Pomf and Thud's Starcraft 2 YouTube channel, he started casting League of Legends games with his friend [[Noi]] in February 2011 through their own YouTube channel "Chips & Noi".

From then on, they became known as an inseparable duo. Their channel's videos received a total of 40 829 018 views between February 2011 and June 2015.

On December 5, 2012, Chips took part in OgamingTV's launch which he created alongside Pomf, Thud and Noi.

From January 27, 2012 to January 31, 2012, they've organized the [[Kings of Europe]] tournament that gathered some of the best european teams at the time. The tournament held a total prize pool of 2500€. A few months later, they repeated their first successful experience with the [[Tales of the Lane]] tournament. The tournament held its finals in Paris at the "Casino de Paris" in front of 1500 people.

Due to their enormous success, Chips & Noi were then chosen to host the [[All-Star 2014]] tournament in Paris organized by Riot Games.

Following their first experience with Riot Games, they were later chosen again to cast games during the group stage of the [[2015 World Championship]] which took place in Paris once again.

On October 10, he and [[Noi]] part ways with [[O'Gaming TV]] as their respective visions were no longer in agreement with the board of directors. <ref>[https://twitter.com/OGTVLoL/status/1321859346511265794 O'Gaming LoL's Tweet]''twitter.com''</ref>
